title: EpiModel 2.6.1
text: Removed extension/custom module support ICM models. control.icm() longer accepts .FUN arguments (e.g., infection.FUN, departures.FUN), skip.check, additional modules via .... ICMs now exclusively support built-SI, SIR, SIS disease types. Users passing custom module functions control.icm() migrate network model class via control.net(), provides full extension model support. Closes #634. trans.rate / trans.rate.g2 param.dcm(), param.icm() – use inf.prob / inf.prob.g2. .m2 parameter suffix param.net() init.net() – use .g2 suffix (deprecated since 2.0). births.FUN / deaths.FUN control.net() – use arrivals.FUN / departures.FUN (deprecated since 1.7.0). depend control.net() – use resimulate.network (deprecated since 2.0). Removed b.rate / b.rate.g2 deprecation guards param.dcm(), param.icm(), param.net(). parameters renamed .rate / .rate.g2 v1.7.0; passing now produces standard R unused-argument error. Closes #989. Changed default legend plot.icm() TRUE NULL. legend now auto-shown y auto-populated (-y default); caller supplies y explicitly, legend drawn unless legend = TRUE passed. matches principled plot.netsim(type = "epi") policy avoids single-entry legend plot(mod, y = ".num")-style calls. Closes #1012.

title: EpiModel 2.6.1
text: Fix saveout.net preserve NULL values saving simulation outputs across multiple runs. Previously, assigning NULL via [[name]][[s]] <- value silently dropped list entry, causing misaligned simulation indices. Now uses list() wrapping ensure NULL values stored explicit list elements. Closes #800. Fix plot.epi.data.frame correctly display truncated time axis. Fix paste0(..., sep = ", ") misuse .data.frame.icm() epi repair warnings errors. paste0() sep parameter, causing malformed output trailing commas. Changed paste(..., collapse = ", "). Closes #985. Fix mutate_epi() replicate scalar constants across simulations/runs use existing column names instead hardcoding "run1". Closes #984. Fix mismatched mean.lwd defaults plot.netsim() dead-code .null branches used inconsistent values (1.5 vs 2.5). Removed dead branches since function signature already provides default 2. Closes #983. Fix unreachable two-group validation crosscheck.dcm() checks rec.rate.g2 r.num.g2 nested stop() calls, preventing ever executing. Closes #982. Fix ylim plot.netsim(type = "epi") auto-range expands fit quantile polygons mean.line = FALSE. previous qnts == TRUE guard matched qnts = 1 / qnts = TRUE, leaving polygons potentially clipped default qnts = 0.5. Closes #1009. Fix plot.icm() skip drawing quantile polygons qnts = FALSE, matching documented behavior. Previously case produced degenerate zero-width band rather suppressing polygon. Fix ylim plot.icm() auto-range expands fit quantile polygons mean.line = FALSE. previous guard triggered mean.line = TRUE, leaving polygons potentially clipped compartment extrema. plot.icm() analog plot.netsim() fix #1009. Closes #1012. Fix silent color recycling plot.icm() three compartments plotted. internal palette bpal hard-coded three entries (c(4, 2, 3)), fourth subsequent compartments render NA (invisible) adjustcolor(). Extended 99 entries match plot.netsim(type = "epi"). Closes #1012. Fix netsim cumulative edgelist (cumulative.edgelist = TRUE) include edges initial network state use time origin networkDynamic object. Previously, update_cumulative_edgelist() first called = 2 resim_nets(), persistent cross-section edges received start = 2 (--one) edges active initial ERGM→TERGM step = 1 silently dropped. cumulative edgelist now seeded end sim_nets_t1() start aligns networkDynamic onset: persistent cross-section edges get start = 0, stop = NA; edges formed first TERGM step get start = 1, stop = NA; edges active cross-section dissolved first TERGM step get start = 0, stop = 0 (mirroring networkDynamic spells [0, 1)). cumulative edgelist now matches .data.frame(get_network(sim)) row--row, including = 0 = 1. tergmLite mode cross-section edgelist captured simulate_dat() overwrites , initial-step dissolutions now recovered well. EpiModel epidemic outputs (e.g., epi data frame) still begin = 1; network time origin shifted align networkDynamic. Closes #1016.

title: EpiModel 2.6.1
text: Replace direct dat$run$nw[[network]] accesses get_network()/set_network() accessors across internal modules (edgelists.R, net.fn.utils.R, net.mod.init.R, net.mod.nwupdate.R, saveout.R, update.R) (#977). Consolidate duplicated quantile mean-line logic plot.netsim(type = "epi") disp.qnts setup, mean.lwd / mean.lty expansion, draw_qnts() / draw_means() call signatures repeated across ylim-calc drawing phases. Closes #997. Apply consolidation plot.icm() keep two sibling plotting paths structurally symmetric. Closes #1010. Extract duplicated stats validation logic plot_netsim_stats() plot.netdx() shared validate_stats_selection() helper; add xlim, xlab, ylim, ylab parameters plot.netdx() parity plot.netsim(type = "formation"). Closes #998. Clarify control.net() docs module.order independent resimulate.network, tergmLite = TRUE forces resimulate.network = TRUE. Change tergmLite override message() warning() visible batch/HPC logs. Add tests module ordering resimulate.network settings. Closes #466. Align remaining stylistic differences plot.icm() plot_netsim_epi(): switch == TRUE / == FALSE boolean guards bare form, reorganize ylim auto-calc popfrac || sim.lines first-class branch, simplify x$param$groups derivation, drop dead lcomp == 1 special case compartment-max block. behavior change. Tracks structural-symmetry goal noted CLAUDE.md. Closes #1012; remaining shared-helper refactor filed #1018.

title: EpiModel 2.6.1
text: Changed default ODE solver control.dcm() "rk4" (fixed-step Runge-Kutta 4) "lsoda" (adaptive step-size). "lsoda" solver automatically adjusts internal step size, preventing numerical instability (negative compartment sizes, NaN values) occur "rk4" models high transmission rates stiff dynamics. Users require previous behavior can set odemethod = "rk4" explicitly control.dcm(). "lsoda" method also default solver deSolve package.

title: EpiModel 2.6.1
text: Added support sensitivity analysis initial conditions DCM models. Vector-valued arguments init.dcm() (e.g., .num = c(1, 5, 10)) now produce multiple model runs, one per element, just like vector-valued parameters param.dcm(). Vectors may used param.dcm() init.dcm() simultaneously, provided vectors length. Plotting, .data.frame, summary, print methods work multi-run output. Closes #408. Redesigned epiweb() Shiny applications DCM ICM model classes modern interface built bslib (Bootstrap 5), Atkinson Hyperlegible font, interactive plotly visualizations. DCM app (epiweb("dcm")) now fully reactive run button, includes scenario presets (Flu-like, STI-like, Measles-like), intervention modeling visual indicators, sensitivity analysis blue--red color ramp, vital dynamics, narrative Summary tab R0 epidemic timeline statistics, comprehensive Guide tab. ICM app (epiweb("icm")) features Run Model button -demand stochastic simulation, mean trajectory lines IQR ribbons across multiple simulations, scenario presets adapted smaller populations, intervention vital dynamics support, Summary tab stochastic variation statistics, Data tab switchable views (means, standard deviations, individual simulations). apps include PDF plot download CSV data export. Export make_restart_point function takes netsim simulation object, truncate smallest set elements required restart new simulations . See ?make_restart_point. Refactored truncate_sim S3 generic class-specific methods supported object classes. truncate_sim now supports dcm model class, along icm netsim classes previously supported. Additionally, new reset.time argument function allows flexibility whether reset truncated model object new “time zero”. Use future future.apply instead foreach doParallel parallelization. default parallelization behavior multisession (PSOCK cluster) future.use.plan flag / control use user defined future::plan. new default behavior gives robust default avoiding fork based parallelization can negatively impact many external libraries (e.g. BLAS/LAPACK).

title: EpiModel 2.6.1
text: Fixed bug ICM Shiny app Shiny’s numericInput returns integer-class values, silently excluded init.icm’s internal sapply(init, class) == "numeric" filter, causing population size zero “invalid first argument” error sample(). Fix error get_sims related variable subsetting var argument. Fix plot.dcm ignoring custom legend names nruns = 1 multiple compartments plotted. Fix df2epi plot.epi.data.frame work without warnings epi.data.frame truncated simulations.

title: EpiModel 2.6.1
text: Added requireNamespace checks DT plotly epiweb() provide clear installation instructions packages missing. Fix bug ellipsis (...) passed correctly base::plot plot.netsim function. Set MCMC.maxchanges .Machine$integer.max default TERGM MCMC. Lift check maximum number MCMC changes per step bigger dense networks. Convert Roxygen2 documentation Markdown (previously LaTeXLaTeX). Use arg = NULL function definition instead missing(arg) function body possible. Add messages function restarts checkpointed state. Make .data.frame.icm .data.frame.net resistant cases summary statistic (“epi”) trackers smaller rest, usually due restarting. See ?.data.frame.icm ?.data.frame.net. Store core nodal attributes integers improved performance. Store epi trackers integers default improved performance. Automatic numeric coercion occurs necessary. Restore global options() state plotting functions (comp_plot) comply CRAN policy. Address lintr checks across package. trim_netest now also removes $summary netest, massively reducing final object size. Add get_core_attributes function list core attributes types.

title: EpiModel 2.5

Export param.net_from_table param.net_to_table helper functions convert parameter list parameter data.frames used param.net. Allow saving cumulative edge-list end simulation using save.cumulative.edgelist control argument. Restarting simulation now requires saving dat$run. removes need keep track elements required end simulation. requires EpiModel user put elements dat$run. Export get_forward_reachable get_backward_reachable functions works similarly efficiently tsna::tPath multiple nodes using cumulative edgelists. Export overwrite_attrs, helper function overwrite attributes nodes data.frame start simulation. (see ?overwrite_attrs). .data.frame model classes netsim icm now assign epi.data.frame class addition data.frame. Add plot.epi.data.frame method plot epi.data.frame similar plot.netsim(type = "epi"). Export .epi.data.frame assign epi.data.frame class validate input data.frame correctly formatted.

title: EpiModel 2.5

Move el.cuml, _last_unique_id, _last_timestep attr dat$run update tests; part restructuring dat object. Remove dat$epi$sim.num(.g2) replace dat$run$num(.g2) (single value). values keep track current size network needed model runs. Speed cumulative edge-list calculation splitting current historic edges. Remove deleteAttr function deprecated since EpiModel v2.4.0. function accepting posit_ids argument must now pass exclusively numeric vector. Logical vectors accepted anymore making code heavier error prone. ergm.ego now suggestion shorten dependency chain. needs installed separately use netest egor object.

text: Network models can now use predefined scenarios use_scenario function. See Working Model Parameters vignette details. trim_netest function added reduce netest object sizes common use cases. networkLite class now supports additional functionalities. Duration = 1 time step models netsim tergmLite = FALSE now use tergm simulation produce networkDynamic class object, similar duration > 1 time step case. netdx now supports heterogeneous dissolution model diagnostics. See example help("netdx"). plot.netsim now supports type = "duration","dissolution" homogeneous (“edges-”) dissolution models. Network model parameters can now supplied param.net via data.frame. See Working Model Parameters vignette details. new term fuzzynodematch added, support modeling generalized notions homophily. Network models can now checkpointed automate saving, recovering, restarting simulations interruption, might occur large-scale simulation jobs high-performance computing (HPC) systems. See help("control.net).

title: EpiModel 2.3.0
text: EpiModel’s custom terms absdiffby absdiffnodemix now usable (due enabling symbol search). correct formula now used sim_nets_t1 initializing network non-nested edges dissolution approximation approach netest. References network class internals removed net.utils.R make code function properly networkLites. update_dissolution now correctly handles duration 1 models. get_edgelists get_cumulative_edgelists now throw informative errors network refers non-existing networks. get_partners get_cumulative_edgelists_df throw errors well call functions internally. fix double memory allocation netsim ncores > 1

Dissolution models using nodefactor term deprecated. stergm controls deprecated favor tergm controls. Formula-style simulations used consistently ergm tergm simulation, requiring control arguments class control.simulate.formula control.simulate.formula.tergm. ndtv added “Suggests” () plot.transmat now accepts transmissionTimeline style argument (). Systematic review improvement documentation across package. netest netdx now default control arguments following R’s default argument mechanism. Simulation names now attached netsim object fields produced via save.mechanism. Imputed durational corrections onset-censored edges now sampled geometric distribution rather simply using mean distribution.

title: EpiModel 1.0
text: CRAN release: 2014-06-09 Model parameterization model classes substantially revised improve organization ability expansion. Whereas previous models required input parameters directly main functions (now: dcm, icm, netsim), now parameters input three parameter-processing functions: param, init, control. param function sets core epidemic parameters, init function sets initial conditions, control function specifies model settings. functions class-specific, function .dcm, .icm, .net suffix. Modeling functions renamed clarity consistency: dcm now used deterministic compartmental models (replaces epiDCM) icm now used stochastic individual contact models (replaces epiICM) netest now used network model estimation (replaces epiNet.est) netsim now used network model simulation (replaces epiNet.simTrans) Network models independence epidemic/demographic processes network structures (independent models) previously first simulated epiNet.simNet, pre-simulated networks input epiNet.simTrans. Now network model simulation handled within simulation function, netsim. Network model diagnostics moved within network estimation process (netest) function: netdx. parameter names running, printing, plotting results diagnostics updated consistency. See ?netdx related functions. Internal model functions significantly revised improve efficiency. dcm function can handle model functions, parameter sets, initial conditions arbitrary complexity. See HTML vignette topic : https://www.epimodel.org/ Moved package vignettes external package reduce package size build time.
